subject: Geology
title: The Cambrian Explosion
description: A quick, practical guide to The Cambrian Explosion.

hook.text: 541 million years ago, animal life burst onto the scene. Almost every major body plan appeared at once.

buildup.text: The Cambrian Explosion saw the rapid appearance of most major animal groups in a few million years.

discovery.text: Hard shells, eyes, and predators all evolved together. The arms race between hunters and prey drove rapid change.

twist.text: Rising oxygen levels and the end of Snowball Earth likely set the stage for this unprecedented burst of evolution.

climax.text: The Cambrian Explosion is evolution's big bang. In a geologic instant, life went from simple to spectacularly complex.

punchline.text: Life's biggest leap took just a few million years.

quiz.question: What happened during the Cambrian Explosion?
options: Most major animal groups appeared rapidly
